chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET ELECTION APPELLATE TRIBUNAL SUKKUR. (BEFORE MR. JUSTICE IRSHAD ALI SHAH) Election Appeal No.S-33 of 2024 (Muhammad Hassan Chachar Vs Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 70/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case. 09-01-2024. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Dareshani Ali Hyder “Ada” DAG, Pakistan. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi Assistant Director (Law) ECP. ******** 1. Deferred. 2. The appellant by way of instant appeal has impugned the order of the Returning Officer whereby his nomination paper to contest election from PS-20 (Ghotki-III) has been rejected for the reason that it is stated by his seconder that he has never intended to second the nomination paper of the appellant and his CNIC was taken for sake of fertilizer quota. If it is believed to be so, then it prima-facie suggests that the nomination paper of the appellant was not seconded by anyone legally; it was incomplete and contrary to law and has rightly been rejected by the Returning Officer; such rejection is not calling for any interference by this Tribunal by way of instant Election Appeal, it is dismissed accordingly. Judge/Appellate Tribunal Nasim/P.A
